title: What It Means to Have a Financial Safety Net

scenes.text: Do you have a financial safety net? Here's why it matters.
A safety net can prevent financial ruin during unexpected life events, like job loss.
Wealthy individuals often have multiple safety nets to ensure financial security.
Assess and build your safety net now. It's your financial cushion.
scenes.label: BUILD YOUR CUSHION

scenes.text: Follow if you're done staying broke.

description: A financial safety net protects you from unexpected events. Assess and build yours today for peace of mind. Follow for daily money wisdom!
